title: Apple Vision Pro executive reportedly heads to OpenAI’s hardware team
friendlyTitle: OpenAI is hiring more serious hardware talent
summary: TechCrunch reports that Apple executive Paul Meade, who worked on Vision Pro and reportedly led AI smart-glasses development, is leaving for OpenAI’s hardware team.
friendlySummary: An Apple executive linked to Vision Pro and smart glasses is reportedly joining OpenAI’s hardware team.
whyItMatters: AI hardware is becoming a serious competitive arena, especially around wearables and post-smartphone interfaces. Talent movement from Apple to OpenAI suggests the race is shifting from chat apps toward new everyday devices.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This points to a future where AI may live in new devices, not only in browser tabs and phone apps.
